texto: I've never forgotten what it's like to be in your early twenties, which is not a particularly easy time. You've left your family, you've left the strictures of high school, and you're trying to break free and form yourself but you have to support yourself as well. We don't really give enough credence to that time of life and to its troubles.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Julia Leigh: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I've never forgotten what it's like to be in your early twenties, which is not a particularly eas…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, vida, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de time e school.
